emails.subject: FW: A.01-09-024  PHC Statement draft
emails.body: This appears to be OK and we should be able to sign on however please review the statement and let me know if you see a problem with our support of the PHC statement. Sorry for the short notice and review time. I'll not respond until noon tomorrow. Thanks. Glen
